name: flame
tagline: A self-hosted dashboard for managing links and monitoring services
description: Flame is a personal dashboard for managing links and monitoring self-hosted services. It supports dynamic links, icons, widgets, and a sleek UI that works well as a browser homepage for homelab and server environments.

features.title: Application Dashboard
features.description: Organize and access self-hosted services from a single page

features.title: Custom Application Entries
features.description: Add custom links for internal and external services

features.title: Search Function
features.description: Find applications quickly using a search bar

features.title: Visual Customization
features.description: Customize icons and appearance of dashboard entries

features.title: Bookmark Management
features.description: Use the dashboard as a centralized bookmark page
